response: TO FIND THE RELATIONSHIP, WE SET THE DERIVATIVE TO ZERO AT T=3, YIELDING 27A - 6B + C = 0. THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T=0 TO T=5 IS THE TOTAL DISTANCE DIVIDED BY 5, WHICH IS (125A/4 - 25B/3 + 5C + 5D)/5. THIS WORKS WELL WITHIN OUR MODEL. <<TO FIND>> <<THE RELATIONSHIP>> <<WE SET>> <<THE DERIVATIVE>> <<TO ZERO>> <<AT T=3>> <<YIELDING 27A>> <<6B PLUS>> <<C EQUALS>> <<ZERO>>. <<THE AVERAGE>> <<SPEED FROM>> <<T=0 TO>> <<T=5 IS>> <<TOTAL DISTANCE>> <<DIVIDED BY>> <<5>>. <<THIS WORKS>> <<WELL WITHIN>> <<OUR MODEL>>. <<WELL>> <<WORKS>> <<WITH>> <<WELL>>.
